description_long: This is a rustic wooden handcart with a rectangular open cargo bed constructed from horizontal slats. The cart features four spoked wooden wheels, two on each side, and long, straight handles extending from the front for manual pulling or pushing. Vertical side rails run along the length of the cargo bed, providing containment for transported items and adding structural support. The wood appears weathered, giving the cart a vintage or utilitarian appearance suitable for transporting goods in urban parks, markets, or residential areas. The wheels are attached to the lower frame, and the handles are positioned for ergonomic grip and maneuverability. The overall design is simple yet robust, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
description: A vintage-style wooden handcart with four spoked wheels, open slatted cargo bed, and long front handles for manual transport. Side rails provide containment and support.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open cargo bed, parallel handles extending forward, and the narrow profile of the side rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cart, the four spoked wheels, long handles, and the slatted cargo bed with side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cargo bed, the back ends of the side rails, and the rear wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wheels, handles, and slatted bed from the other side.
